commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh So Azariah slept with his fathers; and they buried him with his fathers in the city of David: and Jotham his son reigned in his stead. David: or, Ozias slept. And they buried him in the field of the royal sepulchre, because he was a leper, and Joatham, 2 Paralipomenon xxvi. (Haydock) Such an aversion had people for lepers, that they would not even bury them with others. (Calmet) Yet he was treated with some honour. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
